scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:deploy: pnpm --filter @workspace/sow-tool run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.start:deploy: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then pnpm run db:push; else echo "[start] DATABASE_URL not set — skipping db:push; DB endpoints will 500 until it is provisioned"; fi; node artifacts/api-server/dist/index.mjs'
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
